title: B.Ed Jobs 2026 – Housekeeper, Cook and More
shortInfo: DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 16 vacancies for Various Part Time and Support posts. Candidates can apply offline by downloading the application form from jamui.nic.in and submitting the completed form through post on or before 15.06.2026.

basic_details.job_title: DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 16 Housekeeper, Cook and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 16 vacancies for Various Part Time and Support posts. Candidates can apply offline by downloading the application form from jamui.nic.in and submitting the completed form through post on or before 15.06.2026.

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 with Diploma in elementary education (D.El.Ed.) or B.Ed., 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Art & Craft/Music, 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Yoga/Sports/Athletics/Physical Education, 8th Pass
qualification.details: Educator (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma in elementary education (D.El.Ed.) or B.Ed. from a recognized university. Art & Craft cum Music Teacher (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Art & Craft/Music from a recognized University. PT Instructor cum Yoga Trainer (Part Time): 10+2 with Diploma/Degree in Yoga/Sports/Athletics/Physical Education. Cook: 8th Pass. Helper-cum-night watchman: 8th Pass. Housekeeper (Sweeper): 8th Pass.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://jamui.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the DCPU Jamui Various Part Time and Support Posts is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: District Child Protection Unit Jamui has announced a total of 16 vacancies for various Part Time and Support posts. These include positions like Educator, Cook, Helper, and Housekeeper.

faq.question: What is the minimum and maximum age limit for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 42 years. Specific age relaxations are applicable for different categories as mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: What are the educational qualifications required for the DCPU Jamui posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post, ranging from 8th Pass for Cook and Helper roles to 10+2 with specific diplomas or degrees for teaching and instructor positions.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any application charges.

faq.question: What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will range from Rs. 7944 to Rs. 10000 per month, depending on the specific post they are appointed to.

faq.question: What is the selection process for DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a merit list based on academic marks and interview performance. The final merit list will be prepared out of 100 marks.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for DCPU Jamui Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it via post to the designated address.

faq.question: Which documents need to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates must attach self-attested copies of required documents, including their photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates, along with the filled application form.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Child Protection Unit Jamui, which is https://jamui.nic.in.
